description: Bot 5 levels with Monday double caps DEPLOYED

changes_from_previous.added: BOT_MONDAY_DOUBLE_CAPS: double per-level entry caps on Mondays
changes_from_previous.reason: Monday is best day for bounce trading: 77% WR, +$46/day. Doubling caps captures more of this edge.
changes_from_previous.backtest_result: +$2.18/day vs baseline, lower max DD (517 vs 604), best recent 60d ($36.95)

pattern_filters_tested.note: 22 pattern variants + 10 VIX variants tested on 332 days. Full results in pattern_filters_20260428_125547.json and vix_filters_20260428_142353.json

mon_double_caps.reason: Monday 77% WR, structural edge from weekend gap

vix_lt15_raise_vol.reason: Too small improvement, not worth the complexity. VIX<15 only affects 21 days.

vix_gt30_halve_caps.reason: Only 14 VIX>30 days — too few to matter. Halving caps costs more than it saves.

vix_gt25_halve_caps.reason: 34 days affected but cuts into good trading days too much.

gap_based_filters.reason: Gaps too common (193/331 unfilled) to filter profitably.

first_loss_filters.reason: Stops recovery trades that make most days profitable.

adr_steep_filters.reason: Marginal improvement in bad days but costs more in P&L.

all_defensive_combined.reason: Over-filtered. Only 25 bad days but $10/day cost.

pattern_filters_tested.key_insight: The bot's edge comes from taking every valid setup. Defensive filters consistently hurt more than they help because the same conditions that predict losing days also occur on winning days. Only structural edges (Monday) improve P&L.
